runStartAuthority.mainFinding: Enter can restart an active run and repeat delivery can create multiple run generations. Domain start resets selected engine resources but retained browser, streaming, Worker, physics, camera and render participants have no coordinated reset-or-preserve transaction.
requiredProof: one admitted command creates at most one run generation
key repeat duplicate stale and disallowed active-run commands cause zero effects
every run-scoped participant records reset rebuild or preserve status
host-local input cannot leak into the successor run
predecessor Worker and streaming results cannot mutate the successor generation
failed preparation preserves or truthfully classifies predecessor state
one RunStarted event and transition are emitted
the first visible frame cites the accepted run and participant generations
source build and Pages behavior agree
